name: Olive Garden Seafood Pasta Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (1 oz each) Newburg sauce mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions.
2. Sort crab meat and remove any shell pieces.
3. Melt butter in a 3-quart non-aluminum saucepan.
4. Add mushrooms; sauté for 3 minutes.
5. Add the sauce mix; stir well.
6. Add milk, water, and wine; stir until the mixture comes to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for 5-8 minutes, stirring constantly.
8. Add green onions, pasta, and crab; stir to combine.
9. Heat through.
10. Spoon into serving bowls and garnish each serving with chopped parsley.
